nasb.text: They journeyed from before Hahiroth and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness; and they went three days’ journey in the wilderness of Etham and camped at Marah.

esv.text: And they set out from before Hahiroth and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and they went a three days’ journey in the wilderness of Etham and camped at Marah.

cnv.text: 從比哈．希錄起行，經過了海來到曠野，又在伊坦曠野走了三天的路程，就在瑪拉安營。

ccb.text: 从比哈·希录启行，经过红海到书珥旷野，在伊坦旷野走了三天，至玛拉扎营；
